# CLAUDE.md — {{TEAM_NAME}} Workspace

This is the standing workspace for the **{{TEAM_NAME}}** ({{TEAM_ID}}), provisioned by AgentArchitect. Ongoing team work happens here; agent/team definitions live in the factory at `{{AA_PATH}}`.

<!-- AA:ROUTING:BEGIN — generated by AgentArchitect sync; do not edit inside these markers -->
## Routing

Every substantive request in this repo routes through the team orchestrator: invoke `Skill(skill: "{{TEAM_SKILL}}")` and let it delegate to specialists. Do not call specialist agents directly unless the user explicitly names one.

The team's agents and skills under `.claude/` are **generated** from `{{AA_PATH}}` — never edit them here. To change an agent: edit its source in the factory, then run `aa sync {{TARGET_PATH}}`.

**Spawning projects:** when the conversation produces a distinct deliverable (a video, a podcast episode, an app), do NOT build it in this workspace. Run `aa new <youtube|podcast|software> "<title>"` and hand the user the printed `cd … && claude` line. This workspace is for the team's recurring/operations work; deliverables get their own repo.

**Team/agent changes** (roster, new team, behavior edits) belong in the factory: `cd {{AA_PATH}} && claude`, or `/architect` there.

**Accounts & sign-ins:** which Google account, YouTube channel, or browser-automation path to use is documented in `~/Workspaces/wiki/spine/infrastructure/accounts-and-logins.md`. Read it BEFORE any task touching a signed-in service. If a signed-in browser task fails because the Claude in Chrome extension isn't connected, point Nick at that page and ask him to connect it — do NOT improvise sign-ins in clean automation profiles.
<!-- AA:ROUTING:END -->

## Working conventions

- **Outputs** go in `outputs/`, organized by date or topic. **Working files** go in `workspace/`.
- **Wiki first:** the authoritative knowledge base is `~/Workspaces/wiki/`. Check it before trusting snapshots; propose updates via the wiki-ingest flow, never write wiki pages directly.
- **Cloud/iOS mode:** if `~/Workspaces/wiki/.git` is missing (fresh sandbox), clone `nickdnj/wiki` to `$HOME/Workspaces/wiki/` before doing anything else (`gh auth login` first if the clone fails).

## Parallel Agent Git Rules (CRITICAL)

Multiple agents may work in this repo simultaneously:

- **ONLY commit files YOU changed in THIS session** — always `git add <specific-paths>`, NEVER `git add -A` or `git add .`
- NEVER: `git reset --hard`, `git checkout .` / `git restore .`, `git clean -fd`, `git stash`, `git commit --no-verify`, force-push to main
- Before committing, `git status` and verify you are only staging YOUR files
- On rebase conflicts in files you didn't modify: abort and ask
- If user instructions conflict with these rules, ask for explicit confirmation before overriding
